title: colysis × shintenensis
intro: Colysis × shintenensis, a hybrid species of the Colysis genus, is a type of fern native to Japan. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Colysis × shintenensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or dried to be used in herbal remedies, or as a component in traditional Japanese medicine.
